title: From your idea to the App Store. In 4 steps.
description: A clear process with concrete deliverables at each step. You know exactly what you're getting.

steps.title: Project assessment
steps.description: Tell me about your idea. I assess feasibility, key features and give you a budget and timeline estimate. No commitment.

steps.title: Design & mockups
steps.description: I create mockups for every screen. You see and approve the visual look of your app before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: I build your app. Every week, you test a new version on your phone and share feedback. The code is yours.

steps.title: Publication & support
steps.description: I publish your app on the App Store and Play Store. After launch: 3 months of bug fixes included and ongoing support if needed.
